user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: AGO Cafe
fields.description: A cozy cafe located near the Art Gallery of Ontario, perfect for a quick coffee break before exploring the museum.

insertion_point.reasoning: The coffee break should be inserted between the Stakeholder Presentation ending at 11:00 AM and the Art Gallery of Ontario visit starting at 12:00 PM. Position 2 places the coffee break in this time gap.
